sources.title: The Young Savages (1961)
sources.description: A district attorney investigates the racially charged case of three teenagers accused of the murder of a blind Puerto Rican boy.

sources.title: The Young Savages (1961)
sources.description: A district attorney investigates the racially charged case of three teenagers accused of the murder of a blind Puerto Rican boy. Watch on RetroFlix.org: https://retroflix.org/the-young-savages-1961/

sources.title: The Young Savages (1961) Burt Lancaster · Dina Merrill
sources.description: Burt Lancaster plays a prosecutor in the trial of juvenile murderers from the Harlem slums. Although a conviction would boost his career, he changes sides when he receives evidence of one of the defendants' innocence.

sources.title: The Young Savages (1961, USA) Burt Lancaster, Dina Merrill, Shelley Winters, Telly Savalas, Edward Andrews
sources.description: The Young Savages is a 1961 American crime drama film directed by John Frankenheimer and starring Burt Lancaster. It was written by Edward Anhalt from a novel by Evan Hunter.The supporting cast includes Dina Merrill, Shelley Winters, and Edward Andrews.The Young Savages was the first film featuring Telly Savalas, who plays a police detective, foreshadowing his later role as Kojak. Wikipedia: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_Young_Savages Suggested Film Noirs: http://bit.ly/2tLevkl The Internet Archive is an excellent choice for entire full length Netflix & YouTube style uploads of drama, mystery, thriller & crime noir movies from the UK & USA for free. metadata.Plot: A district attorney investigates the racially charged case of three teenagers accused of the murder of a blind Puerto Rican boy. He begins to discover that the facts in the case aren't exactly as they seem to be.
metadata.Writer: Edward Anhalt, J.P. Miller, Evan Hunter
metadata.Actors: Burt Lancaster, Dina Merrill, Edward Andrews
